description.description: Provides a detailed explanation of the service perimeter's purpose and scope.

name.description: Specifies the unique name of the Service Perimeter, adhering to the format `accessPolicies/{access_policy_id}/servicePerimeters/{service_perimeter_id}`.

parent.description: The resource within which the service perimeter is defined, typically an access policy in the format "accessPolicies/{policy_id}".

perimeter_type.description: Specifies the type of the service perimeter, either "PERIMETER_TYPE_REGULAR" or "PERIMETER_TYPE_BRIDGE"; "PERIMETER_TYPE_BRIDGE" allows resources to be shared across regular perimeters.

spec.description: Defines the configuration for the service perimeter, including resources, access levels, and restricted services.
spec.type: list(object({access_levels: optional(list(string)),resources: optional(list(string)),restricted_services: optional(list(string)),egress_policies: list(object({title: optional(string),egress_from: list(object({identities: optional(list(string)),identity_type: optional(string),source_restriction: optional(string),sources: list(object({access_level: optional(string),resource: optional(string)}))})),egress_to: list(object({external_resources: optional(list(string)),resources: optional(list(string)),roles: optional(list(string)),operations: list(object({service_name: optional(string),method_selectors: list(object({method: optional(string),permission: optional(string)}))}))}))})),ingress_policies: list(object({title: optional(string),ingress_from: list(object({identities: optional(list(string)),identity_type: optional(string),sources: list(object({access_level: optional(string),resource: optional(string)}))})),ingress_to: list(object({resources: optional(list(string)),roles: optional(list(string)),operations: list(object({service_name: optional(string),method_selectors: list(object({method: optional(string),permission: optional(string)}))}))}))})),vpc_accessible_services: list(object({allowed_services: optional(list(string)),enable_restriction: optional(bool)}))}))

status.description: Defines the configuration for the Service Perimeter's status, specifying access levels, resources, and restricted services within the perimeter.
status.type: list(object({access_levels: optional(list(string)),resources: optional(list(string)),restricted_services: optional(list(string)),egress_policies: list(object({title: optional(string),egress_from: list(object({identities: optional(list(string)),identity_type: optional(string),source_restriction: optional(string),sources: list(object({access_level: optional(string),resource: optional(string)}))})),egress_to: list(object({external_resources: optional(list(string)),resources: optional(list(string)),roles: optional(list(string)),operations: list(object({service_name: optional(string),method_selectors: list(object({method: optional(string),permission: optional(string)}))}))}))})),ingress_policies: list(object({title: optional(string),ingress_from: list(object({identities: optional(list(string)),identity_type: optional(string),sources: list(object({access_level: optional(string),resource: optional(string)}))})),ingress_to: list(object({resources: optional(list(string)),roles: optional(list(string)),operations: list(object({service_name: optional(string),method_selectors: list(object({method: optional(string),permission: optional(string)}))}))}))})),vpc_accessible_services: list(object({allowed_services: optional(list(string)),enable_restriction: optional(bool)}))}))

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for operations like create, update, or delete of the service perimeter; must comply with acceptable timeout values.

title.description: The user-defined name for the service perimeter, must be unique within the project.

use_explicit_dry_run_spec.description: Indicates whether the service perimeter uses an explicit dry-run specification for testing changes without enforcing them.
